svg.text: Oracle powers world and narrative layers. Deterministic validation and reward remain canonical for RL training.

g.text: Keeps ScientistAction, LabManagerAction, Observation, StepResult, and client/server contracts stable
Oracle hooks are optional and additive
rigor x feasibility x fidelity x parsimony
same payload drives API, notebook, and UI

svg.text: Unsloth or HF TRL, reward curves, before/after eval
deterministic reward stays comparable across seeds + checkpoints
Live Oracle mode needs provider SDK + secrets
same endpoints power local, notebook, and hosted usage
Reads same CSV / JSON / PNG artifacts as notebook
Live env, scores, post-mortem, training curves
presentation layer, not the source of scoring truth

g.text: Training: cached Oracle scenarios, deterministic reward, optional Oracle disabled by default
Demo: live Oracle world-building, model-backed Lab Manager, event injection enabled, deterministic reward still canonical
